name: Chili Blanco
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Anaheim chili pepper, fresh or canned
19 ounces canned small white beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground turkey in oil in a medium saucepan and drain excess drippings.
2. Add celery, chilies, and onion to the pan and cook until tender.
3. Stir in water, beans, tomato, zucchini, salt, cumin, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
4. Mix well and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes or until flavors are blended.
6. Serve with condiments and tortillas.
